actions.delete-body: Grafana keeps a history of reports, this action will delete all of them. It is not reversible.

app-config.description: Enable or disable the steps for each check type.
app-config.title: Available Check Types

check-error.message: Check failed to complete. See server logs for details or try again.

check-type-item.heading: Check type: {{name}}
check-type-item.no-ignore-support: Your current version of Grafana does not support ignoring steps

check-warning.message: Check is taking longer than expected (updated {{time}} ago). Inspect server logs for errors or delete and re-create the report to retry.

feature-flag-missing.description: The Grafana Advisor requires the <1>grafanaAdvisor</1> feature toggle to be enabled.
feature-flag-missing.instructions-link: Instructions to enable the feature toggle:
feature-flag-missing.title: Missing feature flag.

home.error-body: Check server logs for more details, refresh the report or open a support ticket if the problem persists.
home.feedback-title: Share your thoughts about Grafana Advisor.
home.partial-results-body: Found too many reports to process. Please delete them and refresh.
home.results-may-change: results may change as checks complete
home.silenced-text: Silenced issues don't appear in this report. Use the eye icon in the top right corner to manage visibility.
home.subtitle: Helps you keep your Grafana instances running smoothly and securely by running checks and suggest actions to fix identified issues.
home.title: Advisor

more-info.description: Below you can find the summary of checks we ran that were passing or not applicable to your instance. Good news, you're doing great in those areas:
more-info.label: No action needed

no-checks.description-line1: Advisor can analyze your Grafana setup and look for potential issues.
no-checks.description-line2: Once a report is generated, it will be automatically updated periodically.
no-checks.title: No checks run yet
